overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character exploring a dimly lit gothic potions classroom. The character moves from a narrow storage room through a stone archway into a large vaulted chamber filled with wooden worktables, cauldrons, and magical equipment, ultimately approaching a locked door at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with bookshelves and potion ingredients

events.description: character approaches the stone archway exit of the storage room

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow storage room lined with wooden bookshelves and glass ingredient jars

entered.detail: tall wooden bookshelves filled with books and scrolls lining the left wall
anatomical skeleton model leaning against the left wall between shelves
shelves holding glass jars with preserved ingredients and specimens
gothic stone archway leading to the main classroom area

segments.scene_description: The character explores a narrow storage room filled with wooden bookshelves, glass jars of ingredients, and a skeleton model. The space is dimly lit with warm artificial light, and the character walks toward a stone archway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: large vaulted potions classroom with work tables

events.description: exits the storage room through the stone archway into the main potions classroom
character turns slightly to navigate between wooden potion tables

agents.ego_description: walking into the main classroom and navigating between rows of wooden potion tables and stools

entered.detail: large wooden worktables with drawers and potion equipment arranged throughout the room
thick stone columns supporting the vaulted gothic ceiling
medieval-style lanterns hanging from chains providing warm illumination
iron cauldron sitting over a small fire on one of the tables

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the storage room into a vast gothic classroom with high vaulted ceilings supported by stone pillars. The space contains multiple wooden potion tables with cauldrons, stools, and equipment. The character navigates between the tables, passing a cauldron with a small fire beneath it.

scene_state.functional_zone: potions classroom far end with ingredient storage and exit door

events.description: character slows slightly while passing a table with a bubbling green cauldron
character approaches and stops at a locked wooden door with interaction prompt visible

agents.ego_description: walking toward the far end of the classroom, passing various potion stations and approaching a locked door

entered.detail: cauldron filled with bubbling green potion liquid on a worktable
floor-to-ceiling shelving units filled with jars and potion ingredients along the right wall
large wooden door with metal studs and a lock mechanism at the far end of the room
decorative banners hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the classroom toward the far end, passing a cauldron with bubbling green liquid and tall ingredient shelves. The character approaches a large locked wooden door at the end of the room, with wall banners visible on the stone walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, dimly lit storage area into a vast, vaulted gothic classroom. It begins within a narrow room crowded with wooden bookshelves, glass jars, and a skeleton model, moving steadily toward a stone archway. As the character passes through the arch, the space abruptly expands into a grand chamber characterized by high ceilings and stone pillars, where the camera navigates between wooden potion tables and stools. The scene then shifts deeper into the room, passing a cauldron with a small fire and another bubbling with green liquid, while tall ingredient shelves line the perimeter. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches a large locked wooden door set against stone walls adorned with banners.
